title: Public IP / Provider Check
command: curl -fsSL https://ipinfo.io/json | python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); print("PUBLIC_IP=" + str(data.get("ip", "unknown"))); print("PUBLIC_ORG=" + str(data.get("org", "provider unknown"))); print(json.dumps(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False))'
notes: Fetch current public IP and provider/organization info with normalized markers plus the raw JSON body.
